nasb.text: He said to me, “For 2,300 evenings and mornings; then the holy place will be properly restored.”

esv.text: And he said to me, “For 2,300 evenings and mornings. Then the sanctuary shall be restored to its rightful state.”

cnv.text: 他對我說：“要到二千三百個晚上和早晨，聖所才得潔淨。”

ccb.text: 他对我说：“两千三百个昼夜。之后，圣所才会洁净。”
